title: Charya
description: Remade many of the game's textures in my style, also makes the terrain textures mostly seamless
body:
⊹ ⨯ . ⁺ ✦ ⊹ ꙳ ⁺ ‧ ⨯. ⁺ ✦ ⊹ . * ꙳ ✦

I remade various textures in my own style, some are basically just Vanilla textures but with my shading style, some are entirely new, also makes the terrain textures mostly seamless. The pack is incomplete however the textures in it still work ok with the default ones and I will likely update the pack in future as well.

I made this pack like half a year ago and then... never got around to posting it until now, I do need to stop doing thattt.

I made a lot of the Nether stuff blue because one of the first packs I used (Rhodox's Painterly Pack) had an option in the customizer for blue nether which I liked.

Should work fine for any version after 1.12.2 although it's probably best used on later versions.

Optifine is not required.

DMCAs will be sent to sites attempting to reupload this without permission.

⊹ ⨯ . ⁺ ✦ ⊹ ꙳ ⁺ ‧ ⨯. ⁺ ✦ ⊹ . * ꙳ ✦
